parameters.query:
select
  p.product_id,
  p.product_raw_id,
  p.rule_top_category_id,
  p.rule_top_score,
  p.rule_shortlist_id,
  p.rule_decision_status,
  p.decision_status,
  s.product_type_guess,
  s.shortlist_count,
  s.shortlist_json,
  s.combined_text
from product_classification p
join classification_shortlist s
  on s.product_id = p.product_id
where
  p.decision_status = 'pending'
  and p.rule_decision_status in ('needs_llm', 'no_match')
  and (s.stage is null or s.stage = 'primary_rules')
order by p.product_id
limit {{ Number($('Run — Create Run').first().json.batch_size) || 5 }};

nodes.name: Load — Select Batch
nodes.notes: pending + needs_llm/no_match; primary shortlist only; LIMIT=batch_size

parameters.query:

    llm_confidence,

    llm_raw_json,

    llm_needs_review = EXCLUDED.llm_needs_review,
    llm_validation_passed = EXCLUDED.llm_validation_passed,

    judge_confidence = EXCLUDED.judge_confidence,
    judge_explanation = EXCLUDED.judge_explanation,
    judge_needs_review = EXCLUDED.judge_needs_review,

    fallback_2a_direction = EXCLUDED.fallback_2a_direction,
    fallback_2a_block_family = EXCLUDED.fallback_2a_block_family,
    fallback_2a_family_code = EXCLUDED.fallback_2a_family_code,
    fallback_2a_nosology_hint = EXCLUDED.fallback_2a_nosology_hint,
    fallback_2a_confidence = EXCLUDED.fallback_2a_confidence,
    fallback_2a_explanation = EXCLUDED.fallback_2a_explanation,

)

    {{ $json.product_classification_log_insert.product_id }},
    {{ $json.product_classification_log_insert.product_raw_id }},

)
RETURNING id, product_id, run_id;

insert into classification_runs (
    run_type,
    workflow_name,
    workflow_version,
    rules_version,
    primary_model_name,
    primary_model_version,
    prompt_version,
    status,
    batch_size,
    metadata
)
values (
    'stage2_primary_llm',
    'Pharmacy Stage 2 LLM',
    'v1',
    'rule_engine_v1',
    'deepseek-chat',
    'v1',
    'deepseek_shortlist_v1',
    'running',
    {{ Number($json.batch_size) || 5 }},
    '{{ JSON.stringify({ trigger: $json.trigger || "manual" }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
)
returning id, run_type, workflow_name, workflow_version, started_at, batch_size;

WITH run_ref AS (
  SELECT {{ Number($('Run — Create Run').first().json.id) }}::bigint AS run_id
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    r.run_id,
    COUNT(pc.*) AS total_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pc.decision_status = 'classified') AS success_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pc.decision_status = 'needs_human_review') AS needs_review_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE pc.decision_status = 'error') AS error_count
  FROM run_ref r
  LEFT JOIN product_classification pc ON pc.latest_run_id = r.run_id
  GROUP BY r.run_id
)
UPDATE classification_runs cr
SET
  success_count = COALESCE(stats.success_count, 0),
  error_count = COALESCE(stats.error_count, 0),
  finished_at = NOW(),
  status = CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(stats.total_count, 0) = 0 THEN 'finished_empty'
    WHEN COALESCE(stats.needs_review_count, 0) > 0 THEN 'finished_with_review'
    WHEN COALESCE(stats.error_count, 0) > 0 AND COALESCE(stats.success_count, 0) = 0 THEN 'finished_with_errors'
    ELSE 'finished'
  END,
  metadata = COALESCE(cr.metadata, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object(
    'total_count', COALESCE(stats.total_count, 0),
    'needs_review_count', COALESCE(stats.needs_review_count, 0)
  )
FROM stats
WHERE cr.id = stats.run_id
RETURNING cr.id, cr.run_type, cr.workflow_name, cr.workflow_version, cr.prompt_version, cr.status, cr.batch_size, cr.success_count, cr.error_count, cr.started_at, cr.finished_at, cr.metadata;

SELECT id, category_code, category_name, direction, hierarchy_level, need_nosology, product_type, administration_route, age_segment, mnn_cluster, differentiation_degree, include_keywords, exclude_keywords, inclusion_comment, is_active FROM categories_dict WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY id

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { _load_categories: true } }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO classification_shortlist (
    product_id, product_raw_id, product_type_guess,
    rule_top_category_id, rule_top_score, shortlist_count,
    shortlist_json, combined_text,
    stage, shortlist_type, parent_stage, shortlist_metadata, rules_version
) VALUES (
    {{ $json.shortlist_insert.product_id }},
    {{ $json.shortlist_insert.product_raw_id }},
    {{ $json.shortlist_insert.product_type_guess ? "'" + String($json.shortlist_insert.product_type_guess).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    {{ $json.shortlist_insert.rule_top_category_id }},
    {{ $json.shortlist_insert.rule_top_score }},
    {{ $json.shortlist_insert.shortlist_count }},
    '{{ JSON.stringify($json.shortlist_insert.shortlist_json || []).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
    {{ $json.shortlist_insert.combined_text ? "'" + String($json.shortlist_insert.combined_text).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
    'fallback_2b',
    'branch_shortlist',
    'fallback_2a',
    '{{ JSON.stringify($json.shortlist_insert.shortlist_metadata || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
    'branch_shortlist_v1'
)
ON CONFLICT (product_id, stage) DO UPDATE SET
    product_raw_id = EXCLUDED.product_raw_id,
    product_type_guess = EXCLUDED.product_type_guess,
    rule_top_category_id = EXCLUDED.rule_top_category_id,
    rule_top_score = EXCLUDED.rule_top_score,
    shortlist_count = EXCLUDED.shortlist_count,
    shortlist_json = EXCLUDED.shortlist_json,
    combined_text = EXCLUDED.combined_text,
    shortlist_type = EXCLUDED.shortlist_type,
    parent_stage = EXCLUDED.parent_stage,
    shortlist_metadata = EXCLUDED.shortlist_metadata,
    rules_version = EXCLUDED.rules_version,
    updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id AS branch_shortlist_id, product_id, stage, shortlist_count;

SELECT id, category_code, category_name, direction, hierarchy_level, need_nosology, product_type, administration_route, age_segment, mnn_cluster, differentiation_degree, include_keywords, exclude_keywords, inclusion_comment, is_active FROM categories_dict WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY id

nodes.name: Judge — Route
nodes.notes: out[0]: judge + log | out[1]: direct → DB

parameters.content:
## Субпроцесс 2B

Route → branch shortlist → Insert → Skip? → Agent → Post

category_id **строго** в branch shortlist

## Субпроцесс 2A

Categories (parallel) → Merge → Rule filter → Skip? → Agent → Post

Выход: `direction`, `block_family` — **без category_id**

## Setup

**In** — триггеры (manual / webhook)
**Run** — `run_id`, constants
**Load** — SQL batch → attach run → limit

## classification-stage2-dev

**Контракт:** `Categories/stage2_workflow_contract.md`

Swimlanes: Setup → P1 → 2A → 2B → Judge → DB/Fin

Запуск: UI manual | `python3 scripts/run_workflow.py --wait`

## Субпроцесс P1

Build → Prepare → Agent → Merge → Post → **Route**

| Route out | Куда |
|---|---|
| 0 fallback | 2A + log |
| 1 classified | DB ↓ |

## Субпроцесс Judge (Polza / Qwen)

Route → Prepare → Agent → Merge → Post → DB ↓

Арбитраж P1 + 2A + 2B при конфликте

## DB + Fin (общий слой)

Все Route/Post-process ведут сюда:
Snapshot + Log → Barrier → Close run
